case_title: GUZHOVIN ALEX VS THE CITY TOW

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-14-1993, GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $705.95 FILED BY GUZHOVIN ALEX AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUZHOVIN ALEX RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW $705.95 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $725.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW HEARING SET FOR JUL-14-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUZHOVIN ALEX IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW REMANDED FROM SUPERIOR COURT SCA 22810. PLFT ALEX GUZHOVIN SHALL PAY $38.00 COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-27-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-28-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUZHOVIN ALEX IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW JUDGM. AMENDED ON 4-11-94 IN SCA 22810. PLTT. NOT TO PAY DEFEND. APPEAL FEE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT. RECEIPT TO ROSE MARY BIRD (CITY TOW) RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUZHOVIN ALEX RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW $630.25 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $650.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22810, RECORD TRANSFERRED
